name: zoho-inventory
description: Zoho Inventory: a real-world test that exercises every nuance the scaffolder should handle — OAuth refresh, multi-region routing, offset pagination, multipart uploads, composite resources, plan-tier rate limits.

rubric.structural_similarity: Files: bin/<api>-cli.mjs is a thin dispatcher; lib/{api,auth,output,config,args,help,env}.mjs are present; commands/<resource>.mjs files exist (one per resource); skills/<api>-cli-{workflow,auth,resources,knowledge}/SKILL.md all exist; knowledge/ has the listed files; .clify.json declares the listed nuances; tests pass.
rubric.code_quality: Helper signatures match the exemplar (apiRequest, output, errorOut, splitGlobal, toParseArgs, checkRequired, paginate). Auth swapping is a registry edit, not a code rewrite. Pagination is a library iterator. No duplicated payload-building across actions of the same resource.
rubric.knowledge_correctness: knowledge/oauth-refresh.md describes the actual Zoho refresh flow (refresh_token grant against accounts.zoho.<region>); knowledge/multi-region.md enumerates .com/.eu/.in/.com.au/.ca with their accounts vs api hosts; knowledge/composite-items.md notes the assembly-stock relationship.
